pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 8, failing to leverage Java 11 features or comply with the migration goal.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the JaCoCo Maven plugin version to a newer snapshot compatible with Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions may fail to instrument or run on Java 11 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Jakarta Inject API dependency to replace the javax.inject API.
pom.xml.why_exists: Java 11 removed javax.inject from the standard library; code using it will fail to compile or run without the explicit Jakarta dependency.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace the javax.annotation API.
pom.xml.why_exists: Java 11 removed javax.annotation from the standard library; code using it will fail to compile or run without the explicit Jakarta dependency.
